title: State Hoisting
description: Move state to the closest common ancestor to share information between sibling components.
problemStatement:
Single source of truth! You have `Input` and `Display` components that need to share a `text` value. Move the `text` state to their parent component `SyncApp`.

**Requirement:** Pass the state down as a prop to both children.
hints: 'Lifting state up' is the most common pattern for sharing data between siblings in React.
expectedOutput: State maintained in Parent and passed to both Child components
